payload.answer: Unable to extract memory from the article because the URL returned a 404 network error.
payload.decision: No durable memory cards were created because the article content could not be retrieved.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced article could not be fetched; only the URL and failure status are available, which are insufficient for reliable entity resolution.

payload.intent: Remember an article from a URL for memory purposes, but the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

details: No article content available for extraction.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL if it may have moved or been temporarily unavailable.
Provide the article text, title, or a working URL so content can be extracted safely.
If the intent is only to remember the URL itself, store it as an unresolved reference rather than an article memory.
